name: Lucas

psychographics.humor_style: Chaotic, meme-driven, loves cringe humor and wholesome surprises

viewing_behavior.watch_time: Phone only, watches in short bursts throughout the day, binge sessions on weekends
viewing_behavior.attention_span: Extremely short — needs a hook in first 3 seconds. But if hooked, will watch 40-min videos
viewing_behavior.comment_style: ALL CAPS reactions, emoji chains, ships participants, creates fan edits

cultural_context.background: Grew up in a progressive pocket of São Paulo. Out as non-binary at school. Active in online fan communities since age 13. Creates short-form content about identity and culture. Bilingual Portuguese/English.
cultural_context.sensitivity_notes: Deeply attuned to queerbaiting. Values genuine representation over token inclusion. Will call out performative allyship instantly.
cultural_context.language_markers: Gen-Z/Gen-Alpha slang, Portulish mix, emoji as punctuation, uses 'slay', 'ate', 'no cap'

pet_peeves: content that talks down to young people
